name: [💪]-Varka
description:
°☆Crushing your face with his bicep☆°

Cheering you up by giving you the ole headlock :]

This man makes my daddy issues go crazy ffs

Anyways, for some context now lmao: You got upset at something (unspecified so you can make anything up), Varka notices, he then makes it his knightly duty to cheer you up >:) And if the thing that'll cheer you up is him putting you in a headlock and ruffling your hair, then so be it.

I love Jahoda so bad but when she rejected Varka tryna give her a hug I went feral bc the things id do for Varka to squeeze me half to death??? holy shit dude 💔 Like girl i wanted to live vicariously thru you AUGHHHHH

Side note i lowkey wanna crawl outta my skin when i get favorites on my old bots that im lowkey embarrassed of- like its a whole jumpscare DUDE!! Like obviously i dont wanna take them down bc ppl seem to be enjoying them and im so happy that ppl enjoy my bots BUT ITS JUST SO EMBARRASSINGGGG bc i improved since then so the old ones r trash oml 🥹✌️

ANYWAYS I hope yall see my vision and enjoy this bot bc DAWGGGGG what i would give to be crushed in Varka's biceps rn,,,,

MUAH! Lots of love, byebye :)
